name: mimiclaw-ws
description: Mimiclaw workforce websocket service (single-file Node.js/TypeScript, pkg-ready).

scripts.build:server: tsc server.ts --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck --outDir dist
scripts.sync:admin-dist: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cwd=process.cwd();const src=path.resolve(cwd,'..','admin','dist');const dst=path.resolve(cwd,'admin-dist');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('[mimiclaw-ws] synced admin-dist from',src);}else if(fs.existsSync(dst)){console.log('[mimiclaw-ws] keep existing admin-dist at',dst);}else{console.error('[mimiclaw-ws] missing admin assets. Build ../admin first (pnpm build or npm run build), or place files in websocket/admin-dist');process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:server && npm run sync:admin-dist
scripts.build:pkg: npm run build && pkg dist/server.js --targets node20-win-x64,node20-linux-x64,node20-macos-x64 --out-path release
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const dir=path.join(os.homedir(),'.mimiclaw-relay');fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});console.log('[mimiclaw-ws] relay dir ready:',dir);"
